name: Beef Stir-Fry with Mushrooms & Sweet Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over moderately high heat for 30 seconds.
2. Add steak, cut into strips, and fry until no longer pink. Remove from the wok.
3. Add the chopped onion and chopped green pepper to the wok at medium heat. Fry for 1 minute.
4. Mix in sliced mushrooms, marjoram, thyme, and pepper. Fry for 2-3 minutes.
5. Raise the heat to high and stir in white wine. Cook uncovered for 1 minute.
6. Add beef broth and simmer, covered, for 3-4 minutes.
7. Blend cornstarch with cold water until smooth. Stir into the sauce mixture and cook for an additional minute.
8. Return the previously cooked steak strips to the wok and stir gently for 1 more minute.
9. Serve over white rice.
